_comment: Canned Tavily responses (design 07 §3). Mirrors the three listings in assets/listings/index.json so mock discovery produces the same inventory we froze. URLs are realistic-but-fake placeholders; live mode replaces all of this.

search.title: Modern 4BR in Travis Heights — Austin, TX | $865,000
search.content: 4 bed 3 bath 2,410 sqft on a bright corner lot in Travis Heights. Big windows, open plan living, fenced yard, walkable to South Congress.

search.title: Craftsman 3BR near Zilker Park — Austin, TX | $799,000
search.content: 3 bed 2 bath 1,980 sqft character craftsman near Zilker Park. Original wood detail throughout, darker interiors, excellent walk score.

search.title: New build 4BR in Mueller — Austin, TX | $845,000
search.content: 4 bed 3 bath 2,300 sqft new construction in Mueller. Bright blank-canvas interiors, energy efficient, smaller yard.
